scripts.analyze: npm run build:analyze && npm run analyze:top
scripts.build:ci: npm run build && npm run check:css-budget
scripts.check:all: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run build:ci && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build:ci && npm exec playwright test
scripts.test:visual: npm run build:ci && npm exec playwright test e2e/visual-regression.spec.ts
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run design:check && npm run test && npm run build:ci
scripts.test:e2e:docker: docker run --rm -t -e CI=1 -e PLAYWRIGHT_WEB_SERVER_MODE=preview -v "$(pwd)/..":/work -w /work -v miniapp_node_modules:/work/frontend/miniapp/node_modules -v shared_node_modules:/work/frontend/shared/node_modules -v frontend_node_modules:/work/frontend/node_modules mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.58.2-noble bash -lc "cd frontend && npm ci && npm run build -w miniapp && cd miniapp && npm exec playwright test"
